name: Gogmamon

signature_move.name: Giant Grater
signature_move.description: Grinds the enemy with the crystals on its arms.

description: An Ore Digimon with an enormous body. It is said to have a small population at present, and mostly lives in solitude deep inside caves. It hardly ever eats in a conventional manner, instead building up energy by occasionally leaving the cave and taking in light through the crystals covering its body. It reliably eliminates intruders into the cave with its " Giant Grater ", in which it grinds the enemy with the crystals on its arms, and its " Curse Reflection ", where it fires the light energy it has accumulated from the tips of its crystals.
